home.title: Continue Your Story
home.desc: Overview your writing data, continue from recent works, or manage all novels.
home.loadFailDesc: Temporarily unable to load data, please try again later
home.noNovelsDesc: Create a new novel project and let the AI assistant help you build the world and chapters.

novels.upgradeHint: , please upgrade on the pricing page
novels.loadFailDesc: Temporarily unable to load novel list, please refresh and try again.
novels.emptyDesc: Create a new novel project and let the AI assistant help you build the world, outline, and chapters.

settings.accountDesc: Email verification, basic profile, and usage billing
settings.themeDesc: Theme and display language preferences saved on this device
settings.themeHint: Takes effect immediately and remembers preference on this device.
settings.languageHint: Takes effect immediately and remembers preference on this device.
settings.feedbackDesc: Your comment may appear in the homepage creator feedback section.
settings.feedbackPlaceholder: Share how orchestration, continuation, memory, and other features work for you…
settings.feedbackMinLength: Feedback must be at least 2 characters
settings.feedbackError: Failed to submit, please try again later
settings.modelSettingsDesc: Configure BYOK: one API key can power multiple models

model.defaultDesc: Default model for agent chats (can override per session in the editor)
model.credentialDesc: One API key can power multiple models
model.credentialCreateDesc: Keys are stored server-side and can be reused
model.credentialEditDesc: Update connection settings; leave API Key empty to keep the current one
model.credentialDeleteDesc: Delete "{{name}}"? Remove all models under it first.

model.byokFormConnectionExistingEmpty: Create a connection first, or enter a new API key below
model.credentialNoModels: No models on this connection yet — use Add model
model.byokDesc: Use your own API key; chat usage is not billed to platform quota

model.byokCreateRequired: Label is required; API key is required for a new connection
model.byokFormApiKeyOptional: Leave blank to keep existing key
model.byokEditDesc: Update connection settings; leave API Key empty to keep the current one

bookstore.title: Browse AI-crawled works, add to your novels with one click
bookstore.loadFailDesc: Temporarily unable to fetch public bookstore list, please check your network and try again.
bookstore.emptyDesc: After admins start crawler tasks, collected works will appear here, and you can add them to your personal library to continue writing.

myLibrary.title: My Library
myLibrary.description: Manage your uploaded and collected reference books
myLibrary.empty: No books yet — upload or collect from the bookstore

coverDialog.title: AI Generate Cover
coverDialog.desc1: Describe the atmosphere and composition for '
coverDialog.desc2: ', or use the button on the right to let AI complete the prompt.
coverDialog.placeholder: e.g., ancient fantasy, misty mountains, protagonist silhouette, movie poster composition...
coverDialog.noticeDesc: The cover is generated in real-time by an AI image model based on your prompt, for creative reference only; please ensure it does not infringe on others' copyrights or portrait rights. Results may vary slightly due to model randomness.

account.verifySent: Verification email sent, please check and click the link to verify
account.unverifiedDesc1: Verify your email to use all features. Click the button below, we will send a verification email to
account.unverifiedDesc3: , click the link in the email to complete verification.
